name: The Peoples Bank
description_short: The Peoples Bank is an FDIC-insured community bank offering personal and business checking, savings, loans, and digital banking services across Kentucky locations.
description_long:
The Peoples Bank operates as a traditional community bank with FDIC insurance backing, emphasizing local decision-making and personal service. The bank maintains multiple branch locations across Kentucky, including recent expansion to Cave City, and serves both individual consumers and businesses. Leadership includes Chairman, President and CEO Terry L. Bunnell, indicating established institutional structure and community roots dating back to at least the tenure of former President Gordon Guess.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of personal banking products including multiple checking account tiers (Free Kasasa Cash Checking, Free Kasasa Cash Back Checking, Peoples Checking, 55Plus Checking, Relationship Checking, Interest Checking, Everyday Checking, People@Work Checking, and Investment Checking), various savings options (Free Kasasa Saver, Statement Savings, Pennywise Plus, Young Savers), and investment products (CDs, IRAs, HSAs). Loan offerings span personal loans, home mortgages, auto loans, and credit cards. Business customers access dedicated business checking accounts, business investment checking, business savings, merchant card services, business loans, commercial real estate loans, equipment loans, business term loans, and business credit cards.

The Peoples Bank differentiates itself through Kasasa-branded accounts emphasizing no fees and no minimum balance requirements, digital-first banking via mobile apps (iOS and Android) and online platforms, integration with the MoneyPass ATM Network for expanded cash access, and community engagement evidenced by support for local events and organizations like Community Partners for Recovery. The bank advertises local decision-making, personal service, low fees, and higher rates as competitive advantages, contrasting with national mega-banks.

As a regional community bank, The Peoples Bank serves customers seeking personalized service and local branch access rather than cutting-edge fintech features. Primary limitations include geographic constraint to Kentucky locations, undisclosed fee structures for many products, and lack of transparent rate information on the public website. The bank is best suited for Kentucky residents and businesses prioritizing relationship banking and community connection over digital-only or national banking alternatives. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Free Kasasa Cash Checking with rewards options
Multiple personal checking tiers (55Plus, Relationship, Interest, Everyday, People@Work, Investment)
Personal savings accounts including Kasasa Saver and Pennywise Plus
Individual Retirement Accounts (IRAs) and Health Savings Accounts (HSAs)
Personal loans, home mortgages, and auto loans
Credit cards for personal and business use
Business checking and business savings accounts
Commercial real estate loans, business term loans, and equipment loans
Mobile and online banking with bill pay, money transfer, and mobile deposit
Merchant card services and debit cards
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by U.S. government full faith and credit
Multiple checking account options including fee-free Kasasa accounts with no minimum balance requirements
Kasasa Saver product specifically designed to help customers save their cash rewards
Dedicated Young Savers account for customers 17 and under to build banking habits early
Mobile banking available on both iOS and Android apps with bill pay, transfers, and mobile deposit features
MoneyPass ATM Network access for expanded cash withdrawal locations beyond branch locations
Active community involvement including support for local events, nonprofits, and sponsorships like Kentucky Tennis Hall of Fame
cons: Limited geographic footprint restricted to Kentucky locations only, excluding customers outside the state
Website does not display transparent interest rates, CD rates, or loan APRs—customers must contact bank directly
Fee structures for various accounts and services not clearly detailed on public website
No mention of online account opening capability; may require in-person branch visit for new accounts
Limited information about business loan approval criteria, terms, or competitive positioning versus other regional lenders
best_for: Kentucky residents and businesses seeking personalized, relationship-based banking with local decision-making
Customers prioritizing fee-free checking and savings accounts with no minimum balance requirements
Small business owners needing commercial real estate, equipment, or business term loans with local bank relationships
Young customers (under 18) whose parents want dedicated youth savings accounts to build early financial habits
diagnosis: The Peoples Bank is best for Kentucky residents and small business owners who value personal service, local branch access, and community connection over digital-only banking. The main caveat is limited geographic availability (Kentucky only) and lack of transparent pricing and rate information on the public website, requiring direct contact with the bank for specific terms.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
